slides.title: Bun & Hono Mastery
slides.subtitle:
Blazing Fast JavaScript on the Edge
From Zig-powered Runtimes to Type-Safe Hono APIs

slides.name: Aravind Govindhasamy
slides.title: Software Developer
slides.experience: Specialist in Next-Gen JS Runtimes & Edge Computing
slides.oss_experience: Open Source Contributor & Technical Content Creator

box.content: The Zig-powered Speed Demon.
A fast, all-in-one JavaScript runtime, package manager, and bundler written in Zig.

list.text: Built for Speed: Starts nearly instantaneously.
All-in-one: Replaces Node.js, npm, npx, and Webpack/esbuild.

box.content: Why Zig? It allows for manual memory management and low-level optimizations that V8 (C++) can't match easily.

list.text: Zero-overhead: Minimal garbage collection interference.
Compact: Small binary size with massive performance.

box.content: Forget slow polyfills. Bun provides high-performance native APIs for common tasks.
The fastest SQLite driver in the JavaScript ecosystem, built directly into the runtime.
Bun Install: The end of coffee breaks.
Up to 30x faster than npm. Uses syscalls, zero-copy, and hardlinks for peak efficiency.

list.text: Blazing: Installs thousands of packages in seconds.
Global Cache: Shared across all your projects.

box.content: Bun uses a binary `bun.lockb` for faster parsing and smaller disk footprint compared to JSON lockfiles.
The Ultra-Fast Web Machine.
A small, fast, and runtime-agnostic web framework for the edge.

list.text: Lightweight: Under 15KB minified and gzipped.
Blazing Fast: Zero-dependency router tuned for speed.

box.content: Write once, run anywhere. Hono works seamlessly on Bun, Deno, Node, Cloudflare, and more.

list.text: Edge Ready: Perfect for Cloudflare Workers and Lambda@Edge.
Adapter System: Easy to switch between hosting providers.

box.content: Hono doesn't rely on `node:*` modules, making it extremely portable and fast to boot.

list.text: No bloat: Everything is built-in or pluggable.
Secure: Fewer dependencies mean reduced attack surface.

box.content: Express-like simplicity, Edge performance.
Uses a highly optimized trie-based router for O(1) route discovery.
Hono's middleware follows the standard 'onion model' (like Koa or Express).

list.text: Modular: Apply middleware globally or to specific routes.
Sequential: Execution flows through the chain.

box.content: Batteries included! Includes Logger, CORS, Basic Auth, JWT, and more.
Crafting custom logic is straightforward with the `Context` object.
Bundles request, response, and helper methods into a single unified object.

list.text: Request: `c.req` access params, headers, and body.
Response: `c.json`, `c.text`, `c.html` helpers.

box.content: Zod Integration & End-to-End Type Safety.
A TypeScript-first schema declaration and validation library with focus on developer experience.

list.text: Declarative: Define schemas once, use them for validation and types.
Reliable: Catch errors at the edge before they hit your logic.

box.content: Official middleware to validate request data (body, query, params) using Zod schemas.
Infer TypeScript types directly from your Zod schemas to ensure consistency across your app.
box.code:
type User = z.infer<typeof schema>;
// User is now { id: string }

box.content: Zod supports nested objects, arrays, refinements, and custom error messages.
WebSockets, SSE, and RPC.
High-performance full-duplex communication using Bun's native WebSocket support.
Push updates from server to client over HTTP without the complexity of WebSockets.
The killer feature: Share your API's type definitions with your frontend for zero-configuration RPC.
Stream data (like ChatGPT responses) directly to the client for lower perceived latency.
Bun.sqlite & Drizzle ORM.
Deep dive into Bun's native SQLite driver. No bindings, no bloat, just pure speed.

list.text: Prepared Statements: High-performance reuse of queries.
Zero Config: Local file or :memory: databases ready in milliseconds.

box.content: The perfect companion for Bun & Hono: Headless, type-safe, and focuses on SQL-like syntax.
Generate and run migrations with ease while maintaining full TypeScript inference.

list.text: Drizzle Kit: CLI tool for migrations and schema introspection.
Schema Sync: Keep your DB in sync with your code automatically.

box.content: Connecting to distributed databases like Turso (LibSQL), Cloudflare D1, or Neon (Postgres).

list.text: Turso: SQLite on the edge with LibSQL.
Neon: Serverless Postgres with branching capabilities.

box.content: Beyond Traditional Servers.
Deploy Hono apps to 300+ global data centers with almost zero cold start time.
Seamless integration with the Vercel ecosystem for low-latency frontend/backend co-location.

list.text: Edge Runtime: Optimized for streaming and fast execution.
Middleware: Run logic before reaching your main app.

box.content: Execute Hono logic at AWS CloudFront edge locations for global performance.

list.text: Scalability: Handle millions of requests with ease.
Isolation: Secure, isolated execution environments.

box.content: Automating your edge deployments with modern DevOps workflows.
box.code:
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v1
      - run: bun install && bun run deploy

box.content: Fast, In-Memory, and Reliable.
A Jest-compatible test runner built directly into Bun for maximum performance.
Simple but powerful mocking utilities to isolate your units under test.
Support for component snapshots and easy integration with CI pipelines.

list.text: Snapshots: Ensure UI or complex data doesn't change unexpectedly.
CI Integration: Fast execution means faster merge times.

box.content: Test your Hono routes by simulating requests using the `app.request()` helper.
The Future is Fast.
Bun and Hono represent the next evolution of JavaScript development on the edge.

list.text: Unmatched speed and developer experience.
Integrated toolchain for modern workflows.
Ready for the distributed, edge-first world.

box.content: Keep an eye on Biome, Drizzle, and the growing collection of Hono middleware.

list.text: Biome: High-performance linter and formatter.
Hono Middleware: Community-driven ecosystem expansion.

box.content: Embrace the speed. Build for the edge. Master Bun and Hono.
Any questions? Thank you!
